same_scope_invariant: All six gates must reference the same promotion_request_id, selected_lane_id, declared objective, artifact scope, workflow/request hashes, and model/input identities.

objective_declared.pass_rule: One bounded objective and one lane are explicitly selected; the material change and expected result are testable.

lane_queue_update.pass_rule: Exactly the selected lane changes, its status transition is evidence-backed, and ACTIVE_LANES remains ordered and hash-traceable to the queue.

model_registry.pass_rule: Every required model is family-compatible, path-resolved, and hash-verified for the selected lane.

run_package.pass_rule: The package is lane-scoped, reproducible from a clean checkpoint, and binds workflow, request, input, and model identities.

runtime_proof.pass_rule: Target-runtime proof, pullback, and strict whole-artifact QA match the declared lane and scope; local robustness or cross-lane proof cannot substitute.

runtime_gate.pass_rule: All live safety gates and final review pass, final state is stopped, and the promotion does not imply masks, another lane, broader scope, or Wave71+ authority.

decision_rule: Allow only when all six ordered gates pass for the same request, lane, and scope with current hash-verified evidence. Missing, stale, mismatched, inferred, local-only-substitute, or cross-lane evidence denies promotion.
forbidden_substitutions: runtime-smoke viability for final quality certification
file presence for implementation or runtime proof
